media_companies.name: Galactic Sports Network
media_companies.owner: The Vance media dynasty of Earth
media_companies.date_founded: An institution since the early League Era.
media_companies.bio: GSN is the establishment giant of intergalactic football coverage — slick, ubiquitous, and cosy with the inner-system powers it covers. If GSN says it matters, the system believes it matters.
media_companies.political_leaning: Solaris Compact establishment; rarely bites the hands that own the big clubs.
media_companies.reporting_style: Glossy, mainstream, and relentlessly on-message — spectacle over scrutiny.

media_companies.name: Solar System Sports Daily
media_companies.owner: A populist press baron of contested loyalties
media_companies.date_founded: A brash upstart that grew into a giant.
media_companies.bio: SSSD is the loud, sensational tabloid of the leagues — breaking transfers, manufacturing feuds, and never letting a fact spoil a headline. Feared by managers and devoured by fans.
media_companies.political_leaning: Frontier-populist when it suits the story; loyal only to circulation.

media_companies.name: Inner System Sports
media_companies.date_founded: Founded to serve the rocky inner league.
media_companies.bio: ISS is the analysts' channel — tactical, measured, and proudly cerebral. Where GSN sells drama, ISS sells understanding, and the purists adore it for that.
media_companies.reporting_style: Analytical, tactical, and sober — the chalkboard over the soundbite.

media_companies.name: The Outer Voice
media_companies.date_founded: Founded to give the outer worlds their own coverage.
media_companies.bio: TOV is the voice of the outer system, opinionated and chippy, forever arguing that the inner worlds get all the attention and none of the talent. A champion of the underdog.
media_companies.political_leaning: Frontier Coalition sympathiser; advocate for the outer leagues.

media_companies.name: Belt & Beyond Media
media_companies.date_founded: Founded by belt fans for belt fans.
media_companies.bio: BBM is grassroots broadcasting from the asteroid belt — scrappy, community-run, and devoted to the unglamorous clubs the bigger networks ignore. The fans' own voice.
media_companies.political_leaning: Belt-syndicalist; a co-operative through and through.
media_companies.reporting_style: Grassroots, community-minded, and unpolished in the best way.

media_companies.name: Kuiper Chronicle Network
media_companies.date_founded: Founded to connect the scattered Kuiper colonies.
media_companies.bio: KCN is the earnest lifeline of football coverage at the edge of everything, beaming matches across vast distances to tiny, devoted Kuiper audiences. Quietly heroic logistics.
media_companies.political_leaning: Kuiper-autonomist; a voice for the forgotten worlds.

pundits.name: Rex Valorum
pundits.appearance: Silver-suited and authoritative, the elder statesman of the studio.
pundits.bio: A revered retired Earthian midfielder turned the system's most quoted tactical pundit, Rex Valorum dissects matches with the gravity of a man who won everything.
pundits.playing_history: A decorated central midfielder of the old order.
pundits.commentary_style: Tactical and magisterial — pronounces verdicts as if from on high.
achievements: The system's most-watched tactical analyst

pundits.name: Stellar Cruz
pundits.appearance: Warm and quick-witted, the studio's most likeable presence.
pundits.bio: A beloved retired forward, Stellar Cruz brings warmth and sharp generalist insight to GSN's flagship coverage.
pundits.commentary_style: Accessible and warm — explains the game to everyone.
achievements: Most popular pundit by fan vote

pundits.name: Bolt Adesanya
pundits.appearance: Broad and booming, fills the studio with energy.
pundits.bio: A fearsome retired Jovian striker, Bolt Adesanya analyses forwards with the relish of a man who terrorised defences for a living.
pundits.commentary_style: Loud, forward-obsessed, and unafraid to call a player out.
achievements: Famed for his blunt verdicts on misfiring forwards

pundits.name: Crag Montoya
pundits.appearance: Granite-faced and unsmiling, every inch the old defender.
pundits.bio: A flinty retired Cerean centre-back, Crag Montoya is the system's foremost authority on the dark art of defending.
pundits.personality: Stern, grudging with praise, and old-school.
achievements: The leagues' definitive voice on defending

pundits.name: Nova Petrossian
pundits.appearance: Poised and precise, with a keeper's calm.
pundits.bio: A celebrated retired Saturnian goalkeeper, Nova Petrossian is the rare pundit who makes goalkeeping fashionable.
pundits.commentary_style: Specialist and exacting — sees the game through the keeper's eyes.
achievements: The leagues' leading goalkeeping analyst

pundits.name: Tide Okonkwo
pundits.appearance: Smooth and thoughtful, speaks in flowing sentences.
pundits.bio: A graceful retired Europan midfielder, Tide Okonkwo analyses the centre of the park with the fluency he once played with.
pundits.commentary_style: Flowing and cerebral — the poet of the midfield.
achievements: Admired for his elegant tactical breakdowns

pundits.name: Echo Ferrara
pundits.appearance: Sharp and intense, never misses a dip in a player's form.
pundits.bio: A fiery retired Venusian forward, Echo Ferrara specialises in form analysis, calling slumps and surges before anyone else.
pundits.commentary_style: Forensic and unsparing — tracks form like a hawk.
achievements: Renowned for predicting players' slumps

pundits.name: Zephyr Kwan
pundits.appearance: Avuncular and patient, happiest discussing teenagers.
pundits.bio: A respected retired Martian coach, Zephyr Kwan is the system's authority on youth development and the stars of tomorrow.
pundits.commentary_style: Nurturing and prophetic — always naming the next big thing.
achievements: Famed for tipping future stars early

pundits.name: Flare Asante
pundits.appearance: Animated and precise, diagrams set pieces in the air.
pundits.bio: A retired Mercurian coach obsessed with dead balls, Flare Asante is the leagues' go-to voice on set-piece detail.
pundits.commentary_style: Detail-obsessed — pauses everything to dissect a corner.
achievements: The leagues' set-piece authority

pundits.name: Frost Lindqvist
pundits.appearance: Slick and knowing, always seems to know something you don't.
pundits.bio: A former agent turned pundit, Frost Lindqvist trades in transfer whispers and the murky business of the game.
pundits.playing_history: Never played; came up through player representation.
pundits.commentary_style: Insider gossip and transfer intrigue — long on rumour.
achievements: Breaks more transfer rumours than anyone

pundits.name: Axis Delgado
pundits.appearance: Bespectacled and calm, surrounded by floating data.
pundits.bio: A statistics analyst turned pundit, Axis Delgado brings cold numbers to a game that often resists them — and is usually proven right.
pundits.playing_history: Came to football through data, not play.
pundits.commentary_style: Data-driven and dispassionate — lets the numbers argue.
achievements: Pioneered statistical punditry in the leagues

pundits.name: Void Nakamura
pundits.appearance: Serene and watchful, studies players' faces more than their feet.
pundits.bio: A sports psychologist turned pundit from distant Sedna, Void Nakamura reads the mental game — nerve, bottle, and the weight of the moment.
pundits.playing_history: Never played; came from sports psychology.
pundits.commentary_style: Psychological and reflective — interested in minds, not just moves.
achievements: The leagues' voice on the mental game

journalists.name: Iris Volkov
journalists.appearance: Sharp-eyed and ever-present at the inner-league grounds.
journalists.bio: GSN's rocky-inner correspondent, Iris Volkov is the best-connected reporter on the old-world clubs.
journalists.writing_style: Authoritative and balanced — the paper of record on the inner league.
achievements: Broke several major inner-league stories

journalists.name: Kael Nkosi
journalists.appearance: Broad and genial, at home in any gas-giant press box.
journalists.bio: GSN's gas-giants correspondent, Kael Nkosi covers the outer-system powerhouses with insider warmth.
journalists.writing_style: Warm and well-sourced — close to the big outer clubs.
achievements: The definitive voice on gas-giant football

journalists.name: Lux Tanaka
journalists.appearance: Restless and dogged, always on the next flight out.
journalists.bio: The Outer Voice's outer-reaches correspondent, Lux Tanaka champions the unfashionable belt clubs others ignore.
journalists.writing_style: Advocacy journalism — fights the belt's corner.
achievements: Brought outer-reaches stories to a wider audience

journalists.name: Mira Fontaine
journalists.appearance: Hardy and patient, undaunted by vast distances.
journalists.bio: KCN's Kuiper-belt correspondent, Mira Fontaine files from the edge of everything to keep the distant clubs on the map.
journalists.writing_style: Earnest and intimate — a lifeline for forgotten clubs.
achievements: Sole consistent chronicler of Kuiper football

journalists.name: Orion Sharma
journalists.appearance: Slick and quick, phone permanently to his ear.
journalists.bio: SSSD's transfer correspondent, Orion Sharma breaks the deals that set the system talking — accuracy occasionally optional.
journalists.writing_style: Breathless transfer exclusives — first, if not always right.
achievements: The most-followed transfer reporter in the leagues

journalists.name: Pax Okafor
journalists.appearance: Studious and precise, notebooks full of formations.
journalists.bio: ISS's tactics correspondent, Pax Okafor writes the deep tactical pieces the purists save and re-read.
journalists.writing_style: Deep tactical analysis — long-form and rigorous.
achievements: Defined modern tactical writing in the leagues

journalists.name: Quinn Rivera
journalists.appearance: Bright and curious, forever at academy fixtures.
journalists.bio: BBM's youth correspondent, Quinn Rivera tracks the academies and breaks the next generation's names first.
journalists.writing_style: Talent-spotting features — the future, reported early.
achievements: First to profile many future stars

journalists.name: Ren Kowalski
journalists.appearance: Polished and well-travelled, a fixture on cup nights.
journalists.bio: GSN's Celestial Cup correspondent, Ren Kowalski lives for the grand continental nights of knockout football.
journalists.writing_style: Grand, occasion-driven — built for the big nights.
achievements: The voice of the Celestial Cup

journalists.name: Sol Petrov
journalists.appearance: Haunted and intense, sees patterns others miss.
journalists.bio: SSSD's cosmic-architect correspondent, Sol Petrov chronicles the inexplicable — the strange interventions and omens that haunt the leagues.
journalists.personality: Intense, obsessive, and a little unnerving.
journalists.political_leaning: Beyond politics; preoccupied with the cosmos.
journalists.writing_style: Feverish and portentous — reports the unexplainable as fact.
achievements: The leagues' foremost chronicler of cosmic events

journalists.name: Tara Mensah
journalists.appearance: Cool and numerate, at home among the bookmakers.
journalists.bio: GSN's betting correspondent, Tara Mensah reads the odds and the markets that shadow every match.
journalists.writing_style: Market-driven — football through the prism of the odds.
achievements: The leagues' leading betting analyst

journalists.name: Ursa Park
journalists.appearance: Compassionate and meticulous, trusted by medical staff.
journalists.bio: ISS's injuries correspondent, Ursa Park reports on the fitness and fragility of the system's stars with rare care.
journalists.writing_style: Careful and humane — the human cost of the game.
achievements: The trusted voice on player fitness

journalists.name: Vex Diallo
journalists.appearance: Gruff and dogged, a veteran of the inner-league beat.
journalists.bio: ISS's second rocky-inner correspondent, Vex Diallo is the gruff veteran who has seen every inner-league scandal twice.
journalists.writing_style: Sceptical and seasoned — trusts nothing at face value.
achievements: Decades on the inner-league beat

journalists.name: Wren Ivanova
journalists.appearance: Elegant and well-connected in outer-system circles.
journalists.bio: The Outer Voice's gas-giants correspondent, Wren Ivanova covers the ringed-world clubs with style and access.
journalists.writing_style: Stylish and access-rich — close to the outer elite.
achievements: Leading voice on gas-giant clubs

journalists.name: Xia Chen
journalists.appearance: Energetic and grassroots, embedded in the belt colonies.
journalists.bio: BBM's outer-reaches correspondent, Xia Chen reports from inside the belt's working-class clubs and their fans.
journalists.writing_style: Fan's-eye and grassroots — football from the terraces.
achievements: The authentic voice of belt fandom

journalists.name: Yuri Santos
journalists.appearance: Resilient and far-flung, files from impossible distances.
journalists.bio: KCN's Kuiper-belt correspondent, Yuri Santos keeps the distant outer clubs in the conversation against all logistical odds.
journalists.writing_style: Dispatch journalism — reports from the far frontier.
achievements: Sustained coverage of the most remote clubs

journalists.name: Zara Brennan
journalists.appearance: Versatile and unflappable, covers whatever breaks.
journalists.bio: SSSD's general correspondent, Zara Brennan is the all-rounder dispatched wherever the biggest story of the day erupts.
journalists.writing_style: Fast and flexible — first to wherever it's happening.
achievements: Covered every kind of league story

journalists.name: Atlas Kim
journalists.appearance: Quiet and numerate, surrounded by spreadsheets.
journalists.bio: GSN's statistics correspondent, Atlas Kim turns the leagues' raw numbers into the stories behind the stories.
journalists.writing_style: Numbers-led — the data desk's voice.
achievements: Built the leagues' leading statistical column

journalists.name: Celeste Obi
journalists.appearance: Poised and probing, a fixture at managers' press conferences.
journalists.bio: The Outer Voice's managers correspondent, Celeste Obi specialises in the dugout — appointments, sackings, and tactical feuds.
journalists.writing_style: Dugout-focused — the politics of management.
achievements: Broke several major managerial moves

journalists.name: Drift Hartmann
journalists.appearance: Warm and gregarious, happiest among supporters.
journalists.bio: BBM's fan-culture correspondent, Drift Hartmann tells the stories of the people in the stands rather than on the pitch.
journalists.writing_style: Human-interest — the culture around the game.
achievements: The leagues' voice of fan culture

journalists.name: Echo Rashidi
journalists.appearance: Forensic and fearless, unloved by officials.
journalists.bio: SSSD's referee-controversy correspondent, Echo Rashidi makes a career of the leagues' most disputed decisions — and the officials hate her for it.
journalists.writing_style: Investigative and provocative — refereeing under the microscope.
achievements: The leagues' leading voice on refereeing controversy

referees.name: Orion Blackwood
referees.appearance: Tall and severe, with a withering stare.
referees.bio: The most feared whistle in the leagues, Orion Blackwood is a strict disciplinarian who tolerates no dissent.
referees.officiating_style: Strict — quick to the cards, slow to forgive.
achievements: The leagues' most card-happy official

referees.name: Sirius Fontaine
referees.appearance: Calm and unhurried, lets the game breathe.
referees.bio: A beloved lenient referee, Sirius Fontaine prefers a quiet word to a card and is adored by attacking players.
referees.officiating_style: Lets it flow — minimal interference, advantage played.
achievements: Fewest cards per match in the corps

referees.name: Dubhe Santos
referees.appearance: Methodical and watchful, misses nothing.
referees.bio: A by-the-book official, Dubhe Santos applies the laws with even-handed precision and rarely errs.
referees.officiating_style: By the book — consistent and predictable.
achievements: Most consistent ratings in the corps

referees.name: Fomalhaut Chen
referees.appearance: Energetic and animated, sprints with play.
referees.bio: A young, athletic referee, Fomalhaut Chen keeps up with the fastest counters and reads the game like a player.
referees.officiating_style: Proactive and athletic — always near the action.
achievements: Highest match-fitness rating in the corps

referees.name: Aldebaran Singh
referees.appearance: Imposing and stoic, unmoved by protest.
referees.bio: A stern Martian referee, Aldebaran Singh brings the discipline of the red planet to every match he officiates.
referees.officiating_style: Firm and disciplined — keeps tight control.
achievements: Trusted with the biggest Martian derbies

referees.name: Vega Castellano
referees.appearance: Precise and exacting, a stickler for detail.
referees.bio: A pedantic Martian official, Vega Castellano enforces every letter of the laws, to the frustration of flowing sides.
referees.officiating_style: Pedantic — pulls play back for the smallest infringement.
achievements: Most free-kicks awarded per match

referees.name: Merak Ivanova
referees.appearance: Balanced and composed, commands respect quietly.
referees.bio: A widely respected Martian referee, Merak Ivanova balances firmness and fairness as well as anyone in the corps.
referees.officiating_style: Balanced — firm but reasonable.
achievements: Voted players' referee of choice

referees.name: Alnilam Ferreira
referees.appearance: Quick and restless, matches the Mercury tempo.
referees.bio: A fast, frenetic Mercurian referee, Alnilam Ferreira thrives in high-tempo matches that leave slower officials behind.
referees.officiating_style: Fast and decisive — keeps pace with the quickest games.
achievements: Specialist in the fastest fixtures

referees.name: Deneb Asante
referees.appearance: Hard-faced and combative, gives as good as he gets.
referees.bio: A no-nonsense Venusian referee, Deneb Asante handles the leagues' most heated, aggressive fixtures without flinching.
referees.officiating_style: Firm in the storm — built for hostile, physical games.
achievements: Trusted with the most volatile fixtures

referees.name: Altair Nakamura
referees.appearance: Graceful and unobtrusive, lets the beauty flow.
referees.bio: An elegant Saturnian referee, Altair Nakamura officiates with a light touch that suits the ring-world's beautiful game.
referees.officiating_style: Unobtrusive — referees to let football breathe.
achievements: Favoured for showpiece fixtures

referees.name: Electra Fontaine
referees.appearance: Poised and theatrical, plays to the crowd.
referees.bio: A flamboyant Saturnian official, Electra Fontaine brings a touch of theatre to her decisions, for better and worse.
referees.officiating_style: Theatrical — big gestures, dramatic calls.
achievements: The leagues' most recognisable official

referees.name: Rigel Okonkwo
referees.appearance: Vast and authoritative, physically commands the pitch.
referees.bio: A towering Jovian referee, Rigel Okonkwo uses sheer presence to control the system's most physical fixtures.
referees.officiating_style: Presence-led — controls by authority, not cards.
achievements: Trusted with the grandest gas-giant matches

referees.name: Pollux Kowalski
referees.appearance: Steady and communal, attuned to team play.
referees.bio: A measured Callistian referee, Pollux Kowalski reads the synchronised pressing sides of the gas giants better than most.
referees.officiating_style: Anticipatory — reads pressing patterns early.
achievements: Specialist in high-pressing fixtures

referees.name: Canopus Obi
referees.appearance: Quick and sharp, alert to sudden breaks.
referees.bio: A young Enceladean referee, Canopus Obi excels at officiating explosive counterattacking matches.
referees.officiating_style: Transition-ready — never caught out by the counter.
achievements: Specialist in fast-transition fixtures

referees.name: Arcturus Volkov
referees.appearance: Smooth and unhurried, flows with possession football.
referees.bio: A calm Europan referee, Arcturus Volkov is ideally suited to the fluid, patient possession sides of the outer system.
referees.officiating_style: Flow-friendly — rarely interrupts a passing move.
achievements: Favoured for possession-heavy fixtures

referees.name: Capella Rivera
referees.appearance: Watchful and inscrutable, comfortable in the murk.
referees.bio: A perceptive Titanian referee, Capella Rivera keeps control of the hazy, ambush-prone matches of her home moon.
referees.officiating_style: Vigilant — never lulled by a quiet game.
achievements: Trusted with low-tempo, ambush-style fixtures

referees.name: Castor Yamamoto
referees.appearance: Adaptable and unflappable, expects the unexpected.
referees.bio: A flexible Uranian referee, Castor Yamamoto is unfazed by the lopsided, unpredictable football of his home world.
referees.officiating_style: Adaptive — adjusts to whatever chaos unfolds.
achievements: Specialist in unpredictable fixtures

referees.name: Hadar Kim
referees.appearance: Cool and distant, with a far-traveller's calm.
referees.bio: A composed Neptunian referee, Hadar Kim brings outer-system steadiness to the biggest occasions.
referees.officiating_style: Unflustered — calm under the greatest pressure.
achievements: Officiated multiple major finals

referees.name: Betelgeuse Park
referees.appearance: Sturdy and unmoved, at home in physical battles.
referees.bio: A hardy Ganymedean referee, Betelgeuse Park thrives in the grinding, defensive matches of the working-world clubs.
referees.officiating_style: Lets them battle — high tolerance for the physical.
achievements: Specialist in physical, defensive fixtures

referees.name: Polaris Mensah
referees.appearance: Tough and direct, a belt official to the core.
referees.bio: A no-nonsense Cerean referee, Polaris Mensah commands respect in the gritty, hard-fought belt fixtures.
referees.officiating_style: Firm and direct — keeps the belt's games honest.
achievements: Trusted with the fiercest belt derbies

referees.name: Mimosa Patel
referees.appearance: Strong and steady, unbothered by the physical.
referees.bio: A resilient Psychean referee, Mimosa Patel handles the muscular, aggressive metal-world clubs with calm authority.
referees.officiating_style: High physical tolerance — lets strength settle it.
achievements: Specialist in high-intensity belt fixtures

referees.name: Mizar Cruz
referees.appearance: Adaptable and well-travelled, comfortable anywhere.
referees.bio: A versatile Palladian referee, Mizar Cruz adjusts to any style the wandering belt clubs throw at him.
referees.officiating_style: Flexible — reads each match on its merits.
achievements: Officiated across every league

referees.name: Phecda Okello
referees.appearance: Quiet and watchful, comfortable in the gloom.
referees.bio: A patient Hygieian referee, Phecda Okello keeps control of the dark, defensive matches of his subterranean home.
referees.officiating_style: Patient and watchful — control without fuss.
achievements: Specialist in low-scoring, defensive fixtures

referees.name: Spica Hernandez
referees.appearance: Agile and precise, judges the floating ball well.
referees.bio: A nimble Vestan referee, Spica Hernandez is the corps' expert at officiating the strange low-gravity, long-ball game.
referees.officiating_style: Low-gravity specialist — reads the aerial game expertly.
achievements: Specialist in low-gravity fixtures

referees.name: Alioth Novak
referees.appearance: Orderly and precise, runs a tidy match.
referees.bio: A disciplined Junonian referee, Alioth Novak keeps the orderly, organised belt fixtures running like clockwork.
referees.officiating_style: Orderly — tidy, well-managed games.
achievements: Most efficiently managed matches in the corps

referees.name: Achernar Sharma
referees.appearance: Quick and dizzy-proof, keeps up with the whirl.
referees.bio: A fast Haumeian referee, Achernar Sharma is the corps' specialist at the giddy, attacking wide-area game of the Kuiper.
referees.officiating_style: Movement-ready — never dizzied by the whirl.
achievements: Specialist in high-movement fixtures

referees.name: Alcor Brennan
referees.appearance: Solemn and watchful, comfortable in the gloom.
referees.bio: A patient Orcian referee, Alcor Brennan keeps tight control of the dark, set-piece-heavy Kuiper matches.
referees.officiating_style: Set-piece sharp — meticulous at dead balls.
achievements: Specialist in set-piece-heavy fixtures

referees.name: Antares Petrov
referees.appearance: Dignified and experienced, carries old authority.
referees.bio: A veteran Plutonian referee, Antares Petrov brings the dignity of the outer system's grand old world to every match.
referees.officiating_style: Veteran calm — unflustered and authoritative.
achievements: Decades of service at the highest level

referees.name: Megrez Wei
referees.appearance: Steady and balanced, attuned to even contests.
referees.bio: A balanced Charonian referee, Megrez Wei officiates the developing Kuiper sides with patient fairness.
referees.officiating_style: Even-handed — gives both sides their due.
achievements: Trusted with developing-club fixtures

referees.name: Procyon Diallo
referees.appearance: Hardy and defiant, undaunted by the long road.
referees.bio: A resilient Eridian referee, Procyon Diallo thinks nothing of the vast journeys to officiate the system's most remote fixtures.
referees.officiating_style: Counter-ready — sharp on sudden breaks.
achievements: Officiated the most remote fixtures

referees.name: Regulus Torres
referees.appearance: Calm and patient, suits the possession game.
referees.bio: A composed Makean referee, Regulus Torres is well-matched to the patient, creative football of her home world.
referees.officiating_style: Flow-friendly — lets the creative game develop.
achievements: Specialist in possession-based fixtures

referees.name: Bellatrix Nkosi
referees.appearance: Serene and unhurried, the most patient whistle of all.
referees.bio: A serene Sednan referee, Bellatrix Nkosi is unmatched at officiating the glacial, ultra-patient matches of the far Kuiper.
referees.officiating_style: Endlessly patient — never rushes a decision.
achievements: Specialist in the slowest, most patient fixtures
